name: Potential ComRAT Activity
notes: This rule detects ComRAT activity that is a powershell loader to create scheduled tasks.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?(hklm(?::\\)+software\\microsoft\\sqmclient\\windows).*') AND LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?(wsqmcons).*') AND LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?(frombase64string).*') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential ComRAT Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?(hklm(?::\\)+software\\microsoft\\sqmclient\\windows).*') AND LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?(wsqmcons).*') AND  LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?(frombase64string).*') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects ComRAT activity that is a powershell loader to create scheduled tasks.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
